political.s: FEC: $336K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 14 executive donors.

labor.s: Via parent company Ralph Lauren: 7 federal penalties totaling $7.2M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 30/100; Fashion Rev 50%; CHRB 8.4/26; TVPRA exposure; UK MS statement.

charity.s: Via parent company Ralph Lauren: $14M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.21% of revenue) via Ralph Lauren Corporate Foundation. Operates the The Ralph Lauren Corporate Foundation: $8.4M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: Via parent company Ralph Lauren: Cradle to Cradle Certified Gold on the Earth Polo (recycled-fiber line). [C2C Gold]

dei.s: Via parent company Ralph Lauren: HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Ralph Lauren: Good On You It's a Start — climate + animal-welfare improvements. [goodonyou]

wiki.extract: Club Monaco is a Canadian-founded luxury casual clothing retailer owned by Regent, L.P. With more than 140 locations worldwide, the retailer has locations in the United States, Canada, Hong Kong, Macao, Taiwan, South Korea, Mainland China, the United Arab Emirates, Malaysia, Indonesia, Singapore, Saudi Arabia, Sweden, Turkey, and United Kingdom.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: Via parent company Ralph Lauren: 1 CPSC recall on record; sample hazard: fire & fire-related burn.
